title: Manifest schema
outcome: manifest.schema.json (draft-07) with required id/workflow/source/created_at/tool/outputs/retention; retention pattern accepts review-before-delete|permanent|session-exports|auto-archive-after:<N>d. Fixture registry/fixtures/example-manifest.json tracked. ontarch_emit_manifest helper; sync and scan write registry/manifest.json beside generated outputs. _validate_manifest + retention selfcheck (accepts 30d, rejects literal NNd, rejects missing retention).
validation: ontarch:sync and ontarch:scan each write a valid manifest; ontarch:validate PASS (fixture + generated + retention selfcheck).
decisions: auto-archive-after:NNd is a parameterized pattern (e.g. auto-archive-after:30d), not the literal string
day-one writers are ontarch sync/scan only; other bin writers advisory
token_note: one manifest read answers what-is-this / can-I-delete-it without inspecting output files
